titleStmt.title: SII 20.417: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 417. (B.K. No. 105 of 1935-36.) UDAGAṬṬI, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab fixed in a wall of Kūḍali S11ṛiṅgēri-maṭha.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1646, Vis11vāvasu, Pushya, ba. 6, corresponding to A.D. 1726, January 12, when the weekday was Wednesday. The Śaka year was 1647.

The inscription records that Srī Śankara-Bhāratī-Svāṁi got constructed the to� of Śrī Narasiṁha-Bhāratī-Svāmi, disciple of Vṛiddha-Sankara-Bharatī-Svāmi of Sṛingēri, who passed away at Udugaṭi on the above-mentioned date. He also had a temple of Śiva built and made a gift of land at Hirēbidare for the benefit of this temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śriṁgēri śrī Uradha
śaṁkarabhārattisvāmigaḷa śiṣyaru yī
narasihvabhāratti svāmigaḷū śa
kā varuśaṁgaḷu 1646 neya visvāva
su saṁvatsaradā puśa bahuḷa ṣaṣṭi
yalu yi grāmadali muktarāda sa
maṁdha yivara śiṣyaru śriṁgē
ri śrīśaṁkara bhārattisvāmigaḷu tta
ṁma gurugaḷā Uraṁdāvana si
lāmaya Ī guḍi māḍi sivapra
ttiṣṭeya māḍisi ttaṁmā maṭha
dharmake saluvā hirēbidare
Ura muṁdaṇa kariki paṭi māru
yaraḍunu yī dēvarige pujige
sivārpaṇavāgi Aceṁdrāstāyī
yāgi naḍēdēkeṁdu māḍi dhāreyara
du barada silāśāsanāu
Digital edition of SII 20.417 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
